name: The Highlighted Section
effect: Apply visual emphasis to critical information. This card is considered read.

clauses.name: VISIBILITY CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a section is highlighted in yellow: It is considered reviewed by all stakeholders.

clauses.name: SCROLL OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If the document exceeds one page: All highlighted sections below the fold are considered skimmed.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS CLAUSE
clauses.rule: Next meeting: No one read the highlighted section.

witness_quote: I assumed someone else read it.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Did the highlight replace reading it?
